channel.title: Susan-Boyle on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Susan-Boyle on smpaget blog

item.title: Do we use her as much as TV does?
item.description: Yesterday it was suggested that for a youth work session I was taking yesterday I could use Susan Boyle as a my theme and make a big point over her. I didn’t like it as an idea and said no. I just don’t like it as a story/point. Due to all the hype I know what she looks like, but like Paul Potts before her, i have missed the performance and the event totally. Cheryl Lawrie posted this on her blog yesterday
